description: The stable wire surface for offline-first reader-state sync (bookmarks + annotations) over GET/POST /sync/reader. Normative prose: docs/frontend/sync_architecture.md (Shape B). This descriptor is language-neutral on purpose: every client (web reader, PWA, the native app's postilla AnnotationStore adapter) targets THIS, not the reader_sync.py implementation, and verifies its version without importing catalogue code. Reading position is a separate surface (Shape C: /holding/<id>/position) and is NOT covered here.
cursor_semantics: Monotonic integer. A pull returns the server cursor; a delta pull with ?since=<rev> returns only rows with rev > since, INCLUDING tombstones, so a deletion on one device propagates instead of reappearing.
conflict: Last-write-wins keyed by the client-minted uuid `id`, with `rev` as tiebreaker. Deletions are tombstones (`deleted_at` set), never row removal.
auth: Pull: any authenticated session. Push: editor-only — a read-only viewer gets 403 {"error": "read-only"} (reader marks are the library owner's).

query.since: delta pull across ALL holdings: rows with rev > since, incl. tombstones (the offline-sync pull)
query.holding: reader-scoped LIVE paint for one copy (no tombstones) — what the reader loads on open so it never pulls the whole library
query.holding+since: per-copy delta incl. tombstones (the native/PWA reader's offline-sync pull for one open book)

request.ops: array of {type: 'bookmark'|'annotation', ...op fields}; each is an idempotent LWW upsert keyed by id

response.applied: array, one per op, of {id, rev} on success or {id, skipped: true} when the op was malformed or its holding no longer exists (best-effort: one bad op never fails the batch)

bookmark.purpose: A pull row for a bookmark (server-authoritative, carries rev).

fields.holding_id: the copy this mark belongs to (int) — may be null on a tombstone
fields.locator: opaque position string (PDF page number / EPUB CFI)
fields.label: optional user label
fields.deleted_at: ISO-8601 tombstone timestamp; null when live
fields.content_hash: holding version token for orphan relink; never a join key

annotation.purpose: A pull row for an annotation (highlight/underline/strikeout/note/ink).

fields.holding_id: the copy this mark belongs to (int) — may be null on a tombstone
fields.page: PDF page, or EPUB spine index for ink (int)
fields.rect: JSON region for a PDF mark
fields.deleted_at: ISO-8601 tombstone timestamp; null when live
fields.content_hash: holding version token for orphan relink; never a join key

bookmark.purpose: A push op that upserts a bookmark (LWW by id).

annotation.purpose: A push op that upserts an annotation (LWW by id).
